markets.rules_primary: If Tie wins the USA vs Paraguay professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 12, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the USA vs Paraguay professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 12, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties). If the game ends in a tie, the market called "Tie" resolves to Yes. If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two weeks away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. This market and these products have not been endorsed by FIFA. Any references to "FIFA", the "FIFA World Cup," or any other associated marks are descriptive only, and do not indicate an endorsement of this product or any affiliation between FIFA and Kalshi.
